antichain-stabilization.summary: Track irredundant constraint antichain H; show H stabilizes and valid set becomes L-periodic

backbone-periodicity.last_note: Wrong constraint model: uses backbone primes only, but actual L=30 not L=15 for a1=15.
backbone-periodicity.summary: Reduce to backbone types over primes(a_1); show startup types are minimal transversals and constraints stabilize

clique-valid-set.summary: Show valid set eventually becomes a clique; once a clique, stable and L-periodic

saturation-route.last_note: Dichotomy proof is complete but self-describes incorrectly as having a gap. Clean up gap discussion.
saturation-route.summary: Show H becomes saturated (every valid m dominated by some Q) via 2-element set permanence

two-of-k-structure.last_note: Complete proof: dichotomy + CRT periodicity. All steps verified.
two-of-k-structure.summary: Prove constraint antichain H = K_k^2 (all pairs of primes from S); valid set = divisible by >=2 primes from S
